prompt: Edit the visual instruction diagram in image 1: texture the particle labeled 't_n' using the appearance of Earth from image 2, and texture the particle labeled 't_{n+1}' using the appearance of Mars from image 3, retaining the original diagram style.
prompt_refined: Edit the information graphic shown in image 1. Apply the detailed surface appearance of Earth from image 2 as a texture to the circular particle labeled 't_n', located in the top-right portion of the diagram. Concurrently, apply the distinct surface features of Mars from image 3 as a texture to the circular particle labeled 't_{n+1}', positioned in the bottom-left portion of the diagram. Ensure the original diagrammatic style, including all lines, text labels, and the background of image 1, is preserved throughout the edits.
objects: Gray shaded vertical rectangle on the left
Circular particle textured with Earth's surface (top-right)
Circular particle textured with Mars' surface (bottom-left)
White diagonal line connecting the two particles
Two green vector labels with arrows
